description_long: This house is constructed to resemble a small, simple residential building with a gable roof and a single chimney. The exterior walls and roof are textured to look like crumpled white paper, with the roof featuring blue horizontal lines and handwritten text, mimicking a sheet of lined notebook paper. The front facade has a rectangular door with a windowpane design and a single window above it, both outlined in black. The rear side features a window with closed shutters, while the other sides have single windows with a grid pattern. The overall design is minimalist and whimsical, evoking a handcrafted or paper model aesthetic. The house lacks visible steps, porches, or decorative trim, emphasizing its playful, stylized appearance.
description: A small, whimsical house with a gable roof and paper-like textures, featuring simple windows and a paneled door. The roof is lined and inscribed, resembling a sheet of notebook paper.
description_view_0: The house is seen from above, showing the lined, paper-textured roof with handwritten text and a single chimney, as well as a window with a grid pattern on the wall.
description_view_1: The rear view displays the gable roof, chimney, and a window with closed shutters centered on the wall.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the lined roof and a window with a grid pattern, similar to the front but without a door.
description_view_3: The front view features the main entry door with a windowpane design and a single window above, along with the lined roof and chimney.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple rectangular door with windowpane design, no steps or porch, minimal trim
